# Containerd Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-containerd
kind: Containerd
spec: {}
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Containerd
spec:
  path: /etc/containerd/config.toml
  systemdCgroup: true
  registryHosts:
    - registry: registry.k8s.io
      server: https://registry.k8s.io
      host: http://registry.local:5000
      capabilities: [pull, resolve]
      skipVerify: true
```
